scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix shared" "npm run dev --prefix gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/marketiqon-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/buyla-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/ledgira-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/tripora-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/foodelt-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/gamorax-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/stoxenova-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/crealooma-service" "npm run dev --prefix admin-panel"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/marketiqon-service && npm install --prefix services/buyla-service && npm install --prefix services/ledgira-service && npm install --prefix services/tripora-service && npm install --prefix services/foodelt-service && npm install --prefix services/gamorax-service && npm install --prefix services/stoxenova-service && npm install --prefix services/crealooma-service && npm install --prefix admin-panel
